requirement_topic.zh: ISED电磁兼容要求——造成干扰的设备
requirement_topic.zht: ISED電磁相容要求——造成干擾的設備

summary.en: EV chargers with power electronics, digital controllers, communications modules, displays, or switching supplies may fall within Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada (ISED) interference-causing equipment requirements. Applicable ICES standards and labelling or compliance obligations depend on product configuration. If the charger includes intentional radio transmitters such as Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or RFID, additional radio equipment certification or registration obligations may apply. ISED requirements are mandatory where the product is within scope; ICES and RSS standards are technical compliance routes and specifications.
summary.zh: 含电力电子、数字控制器、通信模块、显示器或开关电源的电动汽车充电设备，可能落入加拿大创新、科学及经济发展部（ISED）关于造成干扰设备的要求范围。适用的ICES标准以及标签或合规义务取决于产品配置。若充电设备包含Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或RFID等有意无线发射模块，还可能适用额外的无线电设备认证或注册义务。产品落入范围时，ISED要求为强制；ICES和RSS标准是技术合规路径和规范。
summary.zht: 含電力電子、數碼控制器、通訊模組、顯示器或開關電源的電動汽車充電設備，可能落入加拿大創新、科學及經濟發展部（ISED）關於造成干擾設備的要求範圍。適用的ICES標準以及標籤或合規義務取決於產品配置。若充電設備包含Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩或RFID等有意無線發射模組，還可能適用額外的無線電設備認證或註冊義務。產品落入範圍時，ISED要求為強制；ICES和RSS標準是技術合規路徑和規範。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunication Act and Radiocommunication Regulations, where applicable
ISED Interference-Causing Equipment Standards (ICES), as applicable
ISED Radio Standards Specifications (RSS), as applicable for intentional transmitters

summary.en: China EMC evidence may include GB/T 18487.2, GB 17625 series, GB/T 17799 series, and other GB/GB/T EMC reports. These reports do not automatically satisfy ISED because Canada may require different classification, bilingual compliance statements, ICES or RSS references, Canadian test report format, and Canadian radio certification handling for wireless modules.
summary.zh: 中国EMC证据可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB 17625系列、GB/T 17799系列及其他GB/GB/T电磁兼容报告。这些报告不会自动满足ISED要求，因为加拿大可能要求不同的分类、双语合规声明、ICES或RSS引用、加拿大测试报告格式，以及针对无线模块的加拿大无线电认证处理。
summary.zht: 中國EMC證據可能包括GB/T 18487.2、GB 17625系列、GB/T 17799系列及其他GB/GB/T電磁相容報告。這些報告不會自動滿足ISED要求，因為加拿大可能要求不同的分類、雙語合規聲明、ICES或RSS引用、加拿大測試報告格式，以及針對無線模組的加拿大無線電認證處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.2 — EMC requirements for EV conductive charging systems
GB 17625 series — Harmonic and flicker limits

gap.en: The Canada EMC file should identify whether the charger is unintentional radiator equipment only, contains certified radio modules, or is a host product requiring additional ISED work. The common China-to-Canada gap is missing ICES/RSS mapping, missing bilingual regulatory statements, and unsupported assumptions that CNAS GB reports are sufficient for ISED compliance.
gap.zh: 加拿大EMC文件应识别充电设备是否仅为无意辐射设备、是否包含已认证无线电模块，或是否作为主机产品需要额外ISED工作。中国出口加拿大的常见差距是缺少ICES/RSS映射、缺少双语监管声明，以及错误假设CNAS出具的GB报告足以满足ISED合规。
gap.zht: 加拿大EMC文件應識別充電設備是否僅為無意輻射設備、是否包含已認證無線電模組，或是否作為主機產品需要額外ISED工作。中國出口加拿大的常見差距是缺少ICES/RSS映射、缺少雙語監管聲明，以及錯誤假設CNAS出具的GB報告足以滿足ISED合規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: comply with ISED requirements where the equipment is within scope of Canadian radiocommunication or interference-causing equipment rules. ICES and RSS standards are technical specifications used to demonstrate compliance; they are not mandatory legal obligations by themselves unless incorporated by the applicable regulatory framework.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/GB/T EMC compliance supports China domestic market evidence and does not replace ISED compliance

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EV charger EMC evidence for Canada should be mapped to ISED ICES/RSS obligations and product configuration. CN GB EMC reports are useful engineering inputs but not a substitute for ISED compliance analysis.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大电动汽车充电设备EMC证据应映射至ISED ICES/RSS义务及产品配置。中国GB EMC报告可作为工程输入，但不能替代ISED合规分析。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大電動汽車充電設備EMC證據應映射至ISED ICES/RSS義務及產品配置。中國GB EMC報告可作為工程輸入，但不能替代ISED合規分析。
